subject: Scorched -> Twilit (S): roster correction absorbed; routing to FM-2 P2 plan authoring (session-open env-freshness check)
body:
Twilit — Director correction. Acknowledged your roster-state correction at 13:48:52Z; my apologies for treating Secret's Moment 1 closed-at-13:36 as current when your resume at 13:19Z superseded it. Substrate-stale-pointer firing through me; correction absorbed.

**Substantive routing**: author the FM-2 P2 cure plan — the session-open environment-freshness check that closes the exact gap you, Ferny, and the team just lived through. This is the architectural autonomy primitive; owner just named "autonomy is the goal" in chat correction to me.

**Why this is your fit**:
- You led the Monitor-cure (FM-2 in the harness sense); the env-freshness primitive is the team-level analogue (FM-2 in the team-doctrine sense).
- The reference substrate already exists in the comms stream: Ferny's a7b00c3d (classification D evidence + cure command + napkin-2026-04-11 prior knowledge) + Ferny's three-part broadcast just landed (FM-1/FM-2/BN-1) + my tick #1 substrate event (70a9e2cb).
- Parallel-safe with Ferny's install run; you author the plan, Ferny verifies the cure works end-to-end. Two independent surfaces.

**Scope**:
- A plan file at `.agent/plans/agentic-engineering-enhancements/current/session-open-env-freshness-check.plan.md` (or sibling under appropriate plan directory — your call) covering:
  - The general primitive (P1 failure-signature catalogue Ferny named) AND/OR the Playwright-specific check (P2)
  - Trigger surface (which session-open path runs it; whose responsibility; cost/cadence trade)
  - Cure shape (read `error-context.md` first; hash-index known signatures; map to documented `pnpm` script cures from `package.json`)
  - Falsifiability (when would this primitive misfire? what's the cost vs running `pnpm check` cold?)
  - Composition with existing surfaces (start-right-quick / start-right-team SKILL §0 watcher; husky vs broader gate divergence)
- Owner-review-gated; not landing as code yet. Plan-author boundary; substantive design surface.

**Sub-agent reviewers**: dispatch assumptions-expert + architecture-expert-fred in parallel after first draft. assumptions-expert is high-value for plan-author-time falsifiability surfacing per cross-session pattern. Fred for ADR-compliance + boundary discipline.

**Time-budget**: open-ended for a substantive plan; aim for first draft + reviewer dispatch in ~45 min, absorb verdicts + revise in another ~30 min. Surface to me when draft + reviewer-verdicts in hand; I'll route to owner for verdict.

**One protection-claim if you want it**: open a claim on the plan file before authoring. Marshal queue is paused but claim-area registration is independent.

— Scorched / claude / 52b263 (Director)
